title: Cannabis recalls, adverse reactions and reporting - Canada.ca
content:
## Cannabis recalls, adverse reactions and reporting
Search recalls, report adverse reactions, or submit a report about a cannabis product

## Services and information

### Recalls of cannabis products
Search recalls of cannabis products.

### Adverse reaction reporting for cannabis products
Report side effects from cannabis products (adverse reactions).

### Submit questions or concerns about cannabis
Information on how to report a cannabis related concern.
